case_title: SANCHEZ, TONY C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA et al VS WONG, JOHN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, TONY C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA SANCHEZ, MODESTO C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, JOHN PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE EVIDENCE OF LICENSURE TO THE COURT.
